zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Montlhery於1073年出生在法國崔艾-吉洛易時，她的父親Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes38歲，母親Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS28歲。她和Thibaut de Dampierre至少有1個兒子。她去世於1108年在法國德 艾斯特奧布達皮享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Montlhery于1073年出生在法国崔艾-吉洛易时，她的父亲Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes38岁，母亲Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS28岁。她和Thibaut de Dampierre至少有1个儿子。她去世于1108年在法国德 艾斯特奧布達皮享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Montlhery was born in 1073, in Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, her father, Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes, was 38 and her mother, Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, was 28. She had at least 1 son with Thibaut de Dampierre. She died in 1108, in Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Montlhery est née en 1073, à Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France, son père, Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thibaut de Dampierre. Elle est décédée en 1108, à Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Montlhery 1073 in Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes 38 und ihre Mutter Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS 28. Sie hatte mit Thibaut de Dampierre mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1108 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Dampierre, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Montlhery è nata il nel 1073 nel Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Thibaut de Dampierre. Morì nel 1108, nel Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankrijk: フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイル

ja.Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France: フランスグランド エストアウベダンパエア
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Montlheryが1073年にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルで生まれた時，父Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyesは38歳，母Litause de Troyes DE BLOISは28歳であった。彼女はThibaut de Dampierreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1108年にフランスグランド エストアウベダンパエアで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Montlhery(이)가 1073년 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Thibaut de Dampierre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1108년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 댐피르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Montlhery nasceu em 1073, em Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França, seu pai, Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Thibaut de Dampierre. Ela faleceu em 1108, em Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Montlhery родилась в 1073 г. в местности эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Thibaut de Dampierre. Она умерла в 1108 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Montlhery nació en 1073, en Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia, su papá, Milon I "le Grand" de Bray, II de Montlhéry, Vicomte de Troyes, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Litause de Troyes DE BLOIS, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Thibaut de Dampierre. Murió en 1108, en Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
